message:
feat(protocol): add message handling extensions

Extend protocol and console modules:
- messages.rs: Add new message type handlers
- tables.rs: Update table rendering for new fields
- examples/tables.rs: Add example for new table features
- macros/lib.rs: Additional macro helpers
- tests.rs: Update test fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

                     icon: None,
                     version: None,
                     tags: vec![],
